title: carex frigida var. geniculata
intro: Carex frigida var. geniculata, also known as bent sedge, is a type of grass-like perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family, commonly found in North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Carex frigida var. geniculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
